summary: Frontend regression of the Fixed Assets → Additions 'Net discount / credit' merge flow on run 0e4cc62f-52f9-4668-b598-f60bd0c52803. All 4 UI acceptance points PASS end-to-end on the live preview URL with Playwright + qa_test_session_token cookie.
critical_code_review_comments: AdditionRow.jsx — link button (Link2) is correctly rendered for locked discount rows with rose-coloured hover and testid fa-add-link-${addition_id}; tooltip copy distinguishes discount vs normal merge — good UX.

MergeModal.jsx — defaults linked_as to 'discount_credits' when child.source==='discount_credit', header switches to 'Net discount / credit', and a rose-tinted hint banner appears. Pre-selection visible via bg-slate-900 style on fa-link-as-discount_credits button. Verified at runtime.

MergedRow.jsx — renders with testid fa-merged-${a.addition_id}; for discount credits the addition_id is 'discount-<credit_id>' so fa-merged-discount-<credit_id> resolves as the request demands. ADJ_LABELS map shows 'Discounts/Credits'. Unlink button testid fa-add-unlink-${addition_id} works.

Minor (non-blocking, already flagged in iteration_11): Landing.jsx ledger <select> renders <span> inside <option> due to the live-preview instrumentation attribute — React logs a hydration warning in dev. Does not affect functionality but worth cleaning up at some point by using a plain string child in the filter <option> labels.

success_rate.backend: skipped (pre-verified by main agent, 9/9 pytest green)

seed_data_creation: None. Final cleanup performed: POST /unlink returned {ok:true}; PATCH parent 39447e67-c369-4edd-aa22-7067659240db reset {discount_credits:0, other_expenses:0}; POST /compute re-verified 15% block depreciation = 6,226,269.16 (baseline). Run state is unchanged from pre-test snapshot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount-merge fix is fully green. Testids in play: fa-tab-additions, fa-progress-15-Block-Plant-Machinery (block_label 15% Block – Plant & Machinery slugifies via /\W+/g → '15-Block-Plant-Machinery'), fa-add-link-discount-<credit_id>, fa-link-modal, fa-link-as-discount_credits (pre-selected), fa-link-candidate-<parent_addition_id>, fa-link-apply, fa-merged-discount-<credit_id>, fa-add-unlink-discount-<credit_id>, fa-addition-discount-<credit_id> (reverts after unlink).
verified_acceptance_points: (1) Link button renders on rose-tinted discount rows (fa-add-link-discount-2de5895e-1f53-439f-bbb1-07fed1cbeff8 present).

(2) Modal opens with header 'Net discount / credit' + rose hint 'Discount/credit — magnitude will reduce the parent asset's capitalised cost.' + Discounts/Credits button pre-selected with bg-slate-900 style (only fa-link-as-discount_credits carries the selected class).

(3) Searching 'Haier Split', selecting parent 39447e67-c369-4edd-aa22-7067659240db, clicking Merge → modal closes and fa-merged-discount-2de5895e-1f53-439f-bbb1-07fed1cbeff8 renders with text '↳ Merged · [Discount] BEING GOODS RETURNED · ₹ 7,582.00 · into Haier Split A/C HSU18T-TQS3B 1.5TR 3* (1 unit) · as Discounts/Credits' and an Unlink button.
(4) Clicking Unlink reverts the row to fa-addition-discount-2de5895e-1f53-439f-bbb1-07fed1cbeff8 with the link button visible again; 'Unlinked' toast observed in screenshot.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — this was a regression test of an already-shipped fix. No new issues discovered.
